integration.candidateContract: Inputs are bounded provider candidates; canonical records are rehydrated by the owning service before public output.
integration.fusionContract: Independent retriever rankings are fused by deterministic weighted reciprocal rank fusion and deduplicated by memory id.
integration.strategyContract: Production strategies are balanced, search_first, and event_aware; every strategy materializes only retrievers implemented by the qualified native SQL runtime.
integration.contextContract: Context assembly must remain within the requested token budget and suppress near-duplicate fragments.
integration.embeddingPolicy: Embedding and rerank providers are optional inputs, never canonical storage dependencies.
